title: psychotria krauseana
intro: Psychotria krauseana, also known as the Brazilian gold or Krause's psychotria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Psychotria krauseana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
